# EnviroBiotics

> EnviroBiotics is a probiotic air and surface care system that releases beneficial Bacillus microbes into indoor air and onto surfaces to outcompete mold, allergens, and odor-causing organisms between cleanings. Safe for families and pets.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Probiotic air and surface support for a fresher home between cleanings.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): How probiotic purification settles on surfaces and circulates through the air.
- [Solutions](/solutions): Room-by-room and HVAC solutions for indoor microbial balance.
- [Shop](/shop): EnviroBiotics products and subscriptions.
- [HVAC](/hvac): Whole-home probiotic delivery through your HVAC system.
- [Safety](/safety): Independent testing, GRAS strain selection, and safety data.
- [About](/about): The company, mission, and team behind EnviroBiotics.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach our support and sales teams.

## Education

- [Education Center](/education): Guides on probiotic purification, microbiome health, and indoor air quality.
- [Probiotic Air Purification](/probiotic-air-purification): What probiotic air purification is and how it differs from filtration.
- [Probiotic vs. Chemical Disinfection](/probiotic-vs-chemical): A side-by-side comparison.
- [Competitive Exclusion](/competitive-exclusion): The microbiology behind beneficial-microbe surface care.
- [FDA GRAS Status](/fda-gras-status): How GRAS strain evaluation works.
- [Indoor Microbiome](/indoor-microbiome): Why indoor microbial diversity matters.
- [Hygiene Hypothesis](/hygiene-hypothesis): Modern research on early-life microbial exposure.
- [Mold and Allergens](/mold-and-allergens): How mold, dust mites, and pet dander interact indoors.
- [Pet Dander](/pet-dander): Reducing pet allergen load.
- [Dust Mite Allergens](/dust-mite-allergens): Strategies for dust mite reduction.
- [Mold Indoors](/mold-indoors): Causes, risks, and remediation.
- [Health Benefits](/health-benefits): Reported outcomes from probiotic environmental care.
- [Research](/research): Peer-reviewed studies and references.
- [Glossary](/glossary): Microbiology and air-quality terms.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions answered.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles and updates.
- [Videos](/videos): Demonstrations and explainers.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Real-world deployments and results.

## Compare

- [vs. HEPA](/compare/hepa): Probiotic surface care vs. HEPA filtration.
- [vs. UVC](/compare/uvc): Probiotic surface care vs. UVC sterilization.
- [vs. Chemical Fresheners](/compare/chemical-fresheners): Probiotic balance vs. chemical fragrance.
- [vs. Bio-Healing](/compare/bio-healing): How EnviroBiotics differs from bio-healing alternatives.
